hero.title: Your new tab,
hero.subtitle: fully personalized
hero.description: Transform your browser with an elegant dashboard, smart widgets, IDE-style notes, and total control over your workspace.

notes.title: IDE Notes
notes.description: Integrated note editor with tags, colors, and pinning.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Manage your most visited sites with folders and context menus.

customization.title: Full Customization
customization.description: Change backgrounds (Upload or URL), 9+ premium fonts, and any accent color you want.

widgets.title: Smart Widgets
widgets.description: Real-time CPU & RAM monitoring, live weather, and Pomodoro timer all in one place.

layout.title: Advanced Layout
layout.description: IDE-style workspace with drag-and-drop editing and layout templates.

v109.title: Background Upload / No Links & Optimization
v109.c1: New Feature: Now you can add background images directly from your desktop without external links.
v109.c2: Image Preview: Selected images are shown as a preview before applying them.
v109.c3: Base64 Storage: Images are converted to base64 and saved in localStorage for persistence.
v109.c5: Event system optimization with intelligent debouncing.
v109.c6: Multi-level cache: Implementation of different cache strategies depending on the data type.
v109.c7: Modular architecture: Code reorganized into independent modules for better scalability.
v109.c8: Full compatibility: Works perfectly on Chrome, Edge, and Firefox.
v109.c9: Responsive design: Optimized for different screen sizes.
v109.c10: Accessibility improvements: More intuitive and easy-to-use interface.
v109.c11: Robust error handling: System with automatic fallbacks for greater stability.
v109.c12: Backward compatibility: All existing configurations are maintained.

v108.title: Favorites Feature Upgrades
v108.c1: Additional settings have been added to position the Favorites bar at the bottom of the screen.
v108.c2: You can now create folders within Favorites and easily drag items into folders or move them back out.

v107.title: Initial stable release
v107.c1: Built-in Clock: Check the time effortlessly without distractions.
v107.c2: Notes Management: Easily create, edit, and delete notes.
v107.c3: Export Notes: Export your notes to a .txt file for easy storage and access later.
v107.c4: Customizable Background: Choose between a static or animated background to personalize your homepage.
v107.c5: Simplified Interface: The notes menu only appears when needed, keeping your workspace clean and organized.
v107.c6: Customizable Font: Change the font of your notes to match your personal style.
v107.c7: Language Options: Customize the interface language with 8 options.
v107.c8: User-Friendly Design: Visually appealing yet functional experience.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.description: Custom Browser Main Page is a dashboard for your browser, designed to replace the default new tab with a highly customizable and productive experience.
introduction.customizableDesc: Every element, from the background to the widgets, can be adjusted to your needs.
introduction.ideDesignDesc: Interface inspired by development tools for a professional workflow.
introduction.why1: Total Privacy: We do not collect your data.
introduction.why2: Lightweight and fast: Optimized not to slow down your browser.
introduction.why3: Open Source: Anyone can audit or contribute to the project.

installation.title: Installation
installation.chromeDesc: The easiest way is to install from the Chrome Web Store:
installation.manualStep3Desc: Enable 'Developer Mode' and select the project folder.

visuals.title: Visuals & Themes
visuals.wallpapersDesc: You can choose from several options for your background:
visuals.wallpapersOption1: Integrated Gallery: Select predefined high-quality backgrounds.
visuals.wallpapersOption2: Local Upload: Upload your own images directly from your PC.
visuals.wallpapersOption3: External URL: Paste a link from any image on the web.
visuals.typographyDesc: We have 9 selected fonts to improve your visual experience, from modern to handwritten styles.

widgets.title: Widgets & Tools
widgets.systemDesc: Monitor your device's CPU and RAM usage in real-time directly from the new tab (Only available in Chrome).
widgets.weatherDesc: Accurate weather information thanks to Open-Meteo. You can configure your location manually or use the search engine.
widgets.pomodoroDesc: Manage your work and rest cycles with an integrated timer and sound controls.
widgets.calendarDesc: View the current month and quickly access your most important pinned notes.

advanced.title: Advanced Features
advanced.editModeDesc: Activate edit mode to reposition any widget using drag-and-drop. Create the layout that best fits your workflow.
advanced.templatesDesc: Export and import your configurations in JSON format. Share your design with other users or keep a backup.
advanced.performanceDesc: Configure animation quality and resource optimization in the advanced settings menu.

community.title: Community & Contribution
community.improveDesc: We are an open-source project and welcome any kind of contribution: translations, code, design, or bug reports.
community.reportDesc: If you find a bug, please open it in the GitHub Issues section.
community.translationsDesc: Help us bring the extension to more languages by contributing to translations.json.

homeDocs.title: Documentation
homeDocs.description: Custom Browser Main Page is an open-source project designed to give you total control. Check our contribution guide, report bugs or request new features on GitHub.
homeDocs.openSourceDesc: MIT License. Feel free to fork!
homeDocs.devGuideDesc: How to compile and install manually.
homeDocs.contributeDesc: We are always looking for collaborators to improve translations, add new widgets or polish the design.
